text: So I was at the coffee shop yesterday
was at the coffee shop yesterday and the barista asks me " Do you want room for milk ? "
Do you want room for milk I said " No , I'm good ! I prefer my coffee like my humor - dark and bitter ! "
dark and bitter But seriously though , have you noticed how expensive coffee is getting ?
noticed how expensive coffee is getting It's like they're charging us rent for the cup !
Why do we talk about the weather so much ?
talk about the weather so much " Nice weather we're having "
Nice weather we're having It's 72 degrees and partly cloudy . . . always !
always Weather apps are useless
Weather apps are useless They say " 10 % chance of rain "
chance of rain I bring an umbrella , it doesn't rain
it doesn't rain I don't bring one , it pours !
it pours The weather is just messing with us at this point !

right My profile says I love long walks on the beach
love long walks on the beach But I live in Arizona ! There are no beaches !

outdoor activities Turns out they meant standing in their backyard drinking beer
standing in their backyard drinking beer I said " That's not outdoor activities , that's just being outside ! "

Paper Jam It's not a paper jam ! The paper is perfectly fine !
